svg.title: RAG System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Three-phase Retrieval-Augmented Generation system showing Data Ingestion, Retrieval, and Generation phases with labeled components and directional arrows.
svg.text: Documents are split, embedded into dense vectors, and stored for later retrieval
Query is embedded with the same model; nearest vectors are retrieved from FAISS
Chunks + query fill the prompt template; the LLM generates a grounded answer
— — — dashed line = cross-phase dependency (FAISS queried during retrieval)
